rounds.reason: P0 bugs touching separate files — run in parallel. #19 fixes session_id to be project-scoped in hooks/log.sh; #18 adds session filter to consecutive-fail counter in hooks/post-build-check.sh. Both are prerequisites for correctness of higher-level features.
P0 guard message format v2 (#20, many hook scripts) + P1 npm publish verification (#24, package.json only). No file overlap — safe to parallelize.

P1 trio with no file overlap: #23 adds circuit-breaker logic to hooks/post-build-check.sh (now stable after Round 1+2); #22 creates new rule-graduation infrastructure files + hooks/log.sh severity field; #21 migrates high-FP guards to ast-grep touching guards/**/*.sh only.
P2 false-positive fixes across multiple guard scripts and docs/known-issues/false-positives.md. Isolated round prevents merge conflicts with #27 and #25 which also modify guard scripts.
P2 test-infrastructure protection — adds test-file exclusion patterns to hook scripts and guard scripts. Must follow Round 4 to avoid conflicts on shared guard files.

P2 cross-platform shell hardening (.gitattributes + PYTHONUTF8 + #!/usr/bin/env bash) touches every shell script in hooks/ and guards/. Placed last among P2 rounds so prior guard edits are merged first.

P3 DX improvements — parallel-safe: #31 targets hooks/post-guard-check.sh or hooks/learn-evaluator.sh (transparent correction); #30 targets hooks/pre-commit-guard.sh (baseline scanning); #29 modifies individual guard scripts only (per-guard suppression comment parsing). No pairwise file overlap.
